creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text: Hi, thanks a lot for the logs, I already have a pretty good idea what's causing this. If it's true, I'll have to find a better way of installing the examples because I'm obviously using some newer "make" feature. Sorry for not using poudriere myself, it's planned as soon as my main server is switched to FreeBSD (in a few months) -- but in this case I feel quite positive about fixing the issue properly from the logs. Expect a corrected version soon.
